work_unit: SK-RE-002+SK-RE-014 fix: write-file.js PowerShell single-quote path injection + NUL control char handling
situation: audit-2026-07-02-003 finding SK-RE-002 (priority 1, pending): write-file.js line 28 interpolates windowsPath and parent into PowerShell single-quoted strings without escaping '. In PowerShell, single-quoted strings use '' to represent literal '; unescaped ' in path (e.g. C:\Users\O'Brien\file.txt) breaks out of quoting context → command injection or syntax error. Co-located SK-RE-014 (priority 11): escapePS function at line 5 does not strip NUL (\x00) or other control chars (\x01-\x08, \x0b, \x0c, \x0e-\x1f), which cause PowerShell parse errors and silent data corruption when embedded in content.
action: Two-part fix in single file: (1) Added escapePSSingleQuote(str) that replaces ' with '' per PowerShell convention; applied to both windowsPath and parent before interpolation into Set-Content -Path and New-Item -Path commands. (2) Extended escapePS to strip control chars [\x00-\x08\x0b\x0c\x0e-\x1f] before applying existing backtick escapes. Exported escapePSSingleQuote for reuse by batch-write.js/push.js/pull.js (same pattern needed per SK-RE-003/004/005). node -c syntax check passed. Committed via opt-worktree.sh from skills project root.
outcome_evidence: node -c syntax check passed; opt-worktree.sh committed to opt-runner-exec-1782940040 and pushed auto/opt-runner-exec-1782940040 to origin (skills repo); worktree diff shows escapePSSingleQuote function added, escapePS extended with control char strip, line 28 cmd template uses safePath/safeParent variables; main restored by opt-worktree post-commit restore.
next_suggestion: 派生 SK-RE-003 fix (batch-write.js:28 same PowerShell single-quote path injection on f.path) — can import escapePSSingleQuote from write-file.js now exported. Then SK-RE-004 (push.js:60), SK-RE-005 (pull.js:41) same pattern.
